title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit created a "Solopreneur Rig" harness for Claude Code with 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session locking for isolated client work. The system demonstrates dynamic model routing across Claude Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku, with real applications including a Spanish-learning music player, local macOS transcription tool, and self-hosted Netlify alternative.
